title: Pricing — SkyDeck.ai
description: Skydeck AI provides scalable pricing options to enhance your training services. Bringing AI to your team!
lede: Access all models FREE for 30 days with your WORK email. Find your ideal plan starting at $19/month
html:
Essential

Seats for your team.

$19/seat — Billed monthly.

  • GenStudio
  • Customized User Tools
  • Control Center to manage workspace
  • System Tools
  • Multi-LLM Support

Get started

Advance

Seats for your team.

$39/seat — Billed monthly.

  • All Essential
  • Invite teammates to your AI chat
  • Scheduled Tool Automation
  • Slack Integration
  • Web Scraping

Get started

Enterprise

Customized for your business.

  • All Essential and Advance
  • Initial Consultation
  • SSO SCIM
  • Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
  • Dedicated LLMs
  • Private LLMs

Contact us

Essential Plus

Seats for your team.

$29/seat — Billed monthly.

  • All Essential
  • Includes $20 platform credit per month for your account to access to 40+ LLMs
